triageFlags.title: Sub-Prime Credit Tier
triageFlags.description: The applicant's credit score places them in the Sub-Prime category, requiring stricter lending criteria.
triageFlags.recommendation: Ensure all additional criteria for Sub-Prime applicants are met, including deposit requirements.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, a score of 575 falls into the Sub-Prime category, necessitating stricter evaluation.

triageFlags.title: High Loan-to-Value Ratio
triageFlags.description: The LTV ratio is high but within the maximum allowable limit for Sub-Prime applicants.
triageFlags.recommendation: Verify the accuracy of the vehicle's trade price and ensure the LTV calculation is correct.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy allows a maximum LTV of 95% for Sub-Prime applicants, and this proposal is close to that threshold.

content.reasoning: The applicant's credit score places them in the Sub-Prime category, which requires stricter lending criteria. The DTI ratio is within acceptable limits for their credit tier, but the high LTV ratio and the applicant's credit history necessitate careful consideration.
